zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Erdington於大約1353年出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾爾丁頓時，她的父親Sir Giles de Erdington34歲，母親Elizabeth de Tolethorpe31歲。她於1374年與Roger Corbet在英國史洛普爾沙波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1395年11月14日在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Erdington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Edington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Edington in Northumberland, Somerset, and Wiltshire, or from Eddington, Berkshire. Edington in Northumberland arises from Old English Idingtūn, from the Old English personal name Ida, + ing, denoting association, + tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Ida ). In Somerset, the name comes either from the Old English male name Ēadwine or from the feminine Ēadwynn + ing + tūn. Edington (Wiltshire) is from either the Old English personal name Ētha + dūn ‘hill’, or from Old English ēthe ‘uncultivated’ + dūn.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Erdington was born about 1353, in Erdington, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Giles de Erdington, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth de Tolethorpe, was 31. She married Roger Corbet in 1374, in Shawbury, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 14 November 1395, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Erdington est née environ 1353, à Erdington, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Giles d’Erdington, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Tolethorpe, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Corbet en 1374, à Shawbury, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1395, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Erdington(이)가 대략 1353년 영국 워윅실르 르딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Giles de Erdington(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Tolethorpe(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 슈럽실르 쇼버이에서 Roger Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 11월 14일 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Englan: барроу упон соар, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Erdington родилась около 1353 г. в местности эрдингтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Giles de Erdington было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Tolethorpe, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Corbet в 1374 г. в местности шавбури, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 14 ноября 1395 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.
